description: Shift master-data / calendar (S1/S2/S3 windows + active weekdays) used to attribute ProductionRuns and telemetry to shifts for shift_comparison (View 4). A structural covariate that the golden-engine conditions on (ConditioningEffect), NOT a SetupMode. Consumed by view-engine kg-source.ts (IN_SHIFT join) and by the golden 'shift' covariate.

attributes.name: shift_id
attributes.description: Shift id (e.g. S1). Consumers must read this as the shift code (view-engine currently reads sh.shift — a bug; should be sh.shift_id).
